item.title: Blender
item.description: Table of contents [[Workspaces in Blender]] [[Shortcuts]] [[Meshes]] [[Objects]] [[Keyframes]] [[Animations]] [[animating]] [[shading]] Tools [[Graph Editor]] Rendering [[rendering]] [[notes/blender/Depth of Field]] [[Rendering workflow]]

item.title: Depth of Field (Blender)
item.description: The Depth of Field for a rendering scene is, in short, where the focus of the camera is and how much more far away a scene can be rendered before it starts losing focus.
